assertions.description: INCORRECT: In the top-level ADACUS.kicad_sch, opamp U102 (MCP6001-E/OT, VCOM buffer) is reported with input_resistor={ref:R304, ohms:2200000}. R304 (2M2) is a resistor in the ADC sub-sheet that connects VCOM (U102 output) to IN_BUF (ADC input buffer signal net). R304 is not on the non-inverting input path of U102 — it is downstream of U102's output. The standalone Power schematic correctly reports U102 without any input_resistor. This spurious attribution occurs because the top-level merges all nets and R304 appears adjacent to VCOM.
